title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 05 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 05 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 05 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 05/03/2026
Today, Dalian iron ore futures exhibited a predominantly sideways, oscillating trend, althoughthe most-traded I2605 contract ultimately closed at 759 RMB per tonne, marking a 1.27% increase from the previous trading session. In the physical market, spot prices increased by 5-7 RMB compared to the prior day. Offering sentiment amongst traders was moderate, while steel mills adopted a cautious stance, resulting in limited enquiries.
